title: Increase Unit Test Coverage (Target >60%)
body: Following the `v1.25.0` release, we need to significantly improve our Go unit test coverage across the server application to improve maintainability and reliability.

sub_issues.title: Test Coverage: API Endpoints
sub_issues.body: Write HTTP tests for untested endpoints in `server.go` and `api_service_*.go` (e.g. admin settings, blacklist, telemetry hooks).

sub_issues.title: Test Coverage: SSO & OAuth
sub_issues.body: Add unit tests to `sso.go` mimicking typical OAuth workflows and mock provider responses.
